mapper.sql:
WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.is_delelte = 0 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND p.id IN (SELECT pt.post_id FROM post_tags pt WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId})
AND p.id IN (SELECT sp.post_id FROM series_posts sp WHERE sp.series_id = #{seriesId})
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.excerpt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM posts p
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.published_at DESC
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.published_at DESC
SELECT id, title, slug, view_count AS viewCount FROM posts WHERE status = 1 AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug} AND status = 1 AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (title, slug, excerpt, featured_image, status, author_id, category_id, view_count, like_count, comment_count, comment_enable, published_at, created_at, updated_at, is_delelte) VALUES (#{title}, #{slug}, #{excerpt}, #{featuredImage}, #{status}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, 0, 0, 0, #{commentEnable}, #{publishedAt}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE posts
title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, excerpt = #{excerpt}, featured_image = #{featuredImage}, status = #{status}, category_id = #{categoryId}, comment_enable = #{commentEnable}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0
UPDATE posts SET deleted_at = NOW(), is_delelte = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS postCount, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) AS commentCount FROM posts WHERE is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalPosts, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS totalViews, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS totalLikes, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) AS totalComments FROM posts WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT status AS `status`, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM posts WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status

SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '未分类') AS categoryName, COALESCE(c.slug, '') AS categorySlug, COUNT(p.id) AS postCount FROM posts p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.author_id = #{authorId} AND p.is_delelte = 0 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY p.category_id ORDER BY postCount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM posts p WHERE p.author_id = #{authorId} AND p.is_delelte = 0 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
